sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67578" key="mhtrokoi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μητρο-κοίτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n67578.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">incestuous person</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
